usage_note: 本清单只保留 full.17 外部 live 解阻塞审计用途，不代表 2026-06-15 当前正式发布入口、current release、human 决策口径或 source=neo4j 正向闭环已在本机复放通过。当前正式口径必须以 /workspace/project/mag7-supply-chain/infra/deployment/deployment-manifest.json、products-candidate.json、cloudflare-handoff-checklist.json 与 /workspace/agents/code-reviewer-6/output/full21-live-closure-formal-review-v2/full21-live-closure-formal-review-v2-report.md 为准。

isolation_policy: prefer dedicated Redis instance or DB index
do not run first validation against shared production graph

execution_steps.command: node -v && npm -v && jq --version && curl --version | head -n 1 && jq -r '.package_snapshot_id' /workspace/agents/evidence-collector/output/mag7-full-package/mag7-full-package-manifest.json
cd /workspace/project/mag7-supply-chain && npm run build && cd /workspace/project/mag7-supply-chain/backend && npm run build

cd /workspace/project/mag7-supply-chain && set -a && source /tmp/mag7-full17-live.env && set +a && bash infra/deployment/live-acceptance-commands.sh --mode external --output-dir ${VALIDATION_OUTPUT_DIR:-/tmp/mag7-live-acceptance-full17}

steps: preserve validation output directory as evidence
delete or destroy isolated validation Neo4j database or instance
clear isolated Redis instance or DB index
do not change traffic, DNS, Cloudflare, or paid resource routing
forbidden: first validation against shared production graph
